purpose_digest: OpenAI-compatible proxy + policy engine: content-type 인지 (text/json/code/log) + pluggable compressor registry + CCR-lite(SQLite) + provider router. MVP는 Python-only FastAPI, fixture-based regression.

session.current_baseline: TASK-001 lock-in 완료 (Q1: Python-only 1차, Q2: Redis+Mongo 조합 multi-user). docs/architecture.md 작성 완료. TASK-002 = MVP 구현 1차 cycle planned. 다음 세션은 TASK-002-1 (project skeleton + FastAPI + OpenAI-compatible endpoint mock) 부터 시작.
session.current_axis: TASK-002 MVP 1차 cycle — HTTP proxy skeleton + auth + provider router + Provider Registry (test/list_models/cache) + fixture regression. 한 session = 한 sub-task 사이클 권장.
recent_done_items: TASK-001-followup-1 local LLM architecture 결정 반영: 별도 서버 가동 + URL/port/API key 연결 + Models API 동적 discovery (provider registration flow)
